name: Nussian Civil War
description:
Sup! More Blood Debt bots!

This time, you get to choose between fighting for the Tsar, Kommunism, your people, or Anarchy

Yep! Knockoff Russian Civil War!

Factions!

Nussian Imperial Army

Workers Army

Green Militia

Kyivan Anarchists

Belnussian Separatists

Interventionists(Nopan, Amerika, Pritain)

For the Interventionists, you can choose to be in the Nopanese Imperial Army’s 5th Division, the 27th or 31st Infantry, and for the Royal Kingsland the choice of the Royal Skotts, the Royal Nublon Fusiliers, the Royal Engineers, Royal Machinegunner Corps, the Royal Marines, and Royal Field Artillery

If you are an interventionist, then specify which regiment you are in.
creator: Bobabuilbet
